title: Brotein commit history — supplement carousel, premium-Apple-Watch onboarding, search overhaul
html:
GitHub commits view of Brotein main branch by YG4PRESIDENT (Yahir's GH handle), 2025-07-06 → 2025-07-11. Visible commits:

  • 2025-07-11: BroteinFoodCard UI refinement (gauge alignment, minimal protein readout)
  • 2025-07-11: seamless scroll-position preservation
  • 2025-07-10: supplement carousel + completion flow refinement; infinite auto-scroll Apple-Watch-style supplement picker
  • 2025-07-10: enhance supplement tracker + profile UI
  • 2025-07-10: "Production-ready Sprint" — search, performance, UI, stability
  • 2025-07-09: haptic feedback to search bar; premium UI/UX onboarding
  • 2025-07-08: remove search bar from restaurant menu view; full Supabase URL fix; dynamic scroll cards
  • 2025-07-07: constrain swipe gesture on Explore tabs; search overhaul; explore-tab unification

TL;DR

  • One week-long Brotein sprint focused on onboarding polish + UI consistency, capped by an Apple-Watch-style infinite-scroll supplement picker.
  • The "Resolve image loading by using full Supabase URL" fix is the same family as the nil unwrap crash — Yahir was hardening the Supabase URL plumbing all week.
  • Two daily commit cadence on his prod app — high-velocity solo founder mode.

brotein · swiftui · supabase · xcode

related.label: Brotein Xcode crash — SupabaseClient init nil-unwrap (Secrets.xcconfig REDACTED)
